type="application/ld+json">{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"HowTo","name":"How to get started with RelayGPU","description":"Learn how to integrate RelayGPU's unified AI API into your application in minutes.","step":[{"@type":"HowToStep","position":1,"name":"Create an account","text":"Sign up at relaygpu.com/dashboard using email, Google, or a Web3 wallet."},{"@type":"HowToStep","position":2,"name":"Generate an API key","text":"Navigate to the Keys section in the dashboard and create a new API
